---
title: "Articles"
listing:
  contents: articles
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description]
---

<style>
#title-block-header { display: none; }
</style>

<p class="eyebrow">Writing</p>

<p class="headline">Notes on forecasting, data engineering, and things adjacent to the work.</p>

<p class="lede">Short pieces connected to what I do - sometimes tied directly to a project below.</p>
